title: UnstripLog
description: Accidentally stripped your log? Use bark to unstrip it!
body: # 🪵 UnstripLog **UnstripLog** is a lightweight mod for Minecraft 1.21.1+ that lets you reverse stripped logs back into regular logs using a custom item called **Bark**. Also adds a Bark-to-Paper crafting mechanic! --- ## 📦 Features - ✅ Right-click stripped logs with **Bark** to restore them - ✅ Craft **Paper** from Bark - ✅ Bark is usable as **fuel** - ✅ Lightweight and easy to integrate - ✅ Supports mods with custom logs --- ## 🛠️ Informations - Players can obtain **Bark** by stripping logs or wood blocks. - Alternatively, you can use the [Uncraft Everything](https://modrinth.com/mod/uncraft-everything) mod to convert Paper back into Bark. - While UnstripLog supports custom logs from other mods, it may not work with logs that use non-vanilla naming conventions Our Discord Server: [https://discord.gg/hvFfqsqQm8](https://discord.gg/hvFfqsqQm8)
